title: centaurea golestanica
intro: Centaurea golestanica, also known as Golestan cornflower, is a flowering plant species native to Iran and Afghanistan. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Centaurea golestanica include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and soothing coughs, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Centaurea golestanica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a variety of health conditions.
